about.label: What's behind this?
about.lead: You're not reading a CV. Every answer is generated live by a LLM, grounded in a private, evolving picture of Oscar Fanelli.

points.title: Live
points.body: Each reply is composed in the moment.

points.title: Evolving
points.body: The source is refined day by day, it evolves as I do. Here simplified and exposed with guardrails.

points.title: Beyond this page
points.body: I consult that same digital version of myself to pressure-test decisions, revisit my reasoning, and explore options.

points.title: It can get me wrong
points.body: It's an interpretation, so it can misread or oversimplify. For anything that really matters, please talk to the real Oscar. When it doesn't know, your question is recorded so I can improve the context.

about.openSource: Open source. See how it's built.

suggestedQuestions: What does Oscar lead at InPost today?
How did he scale Uala from 3 to 20 and raise €5M?
What did Oscar learn at Meetup?
What is Oscar looking for next?
inputPrompts: How is Oscar using AI at work?
Where has Oscar worked over the years?
What does Oscar look for in a team?
Why did Oscar co-found a quantum-computing startup?
